name: Rainbow Wave
description: Płynna tęczowa fala przebiegająca przez klawiaturę. Wspiera gradientowanie!
code:
speed = params.get('speed', 0.015)
width = params.get('width', 0.03)
brightness = params.get('brightness', 1.0)
rainbow = params.get('rainbow', True)
color = params.get('color', [255, 0, 0])
reverse = params.get('reverse', False)
rainbow_v2 = params.get('rainbow_v2', False)
grad_on = params.get('gradientOn', False)
grad_colors = [c for c in params.get('gradientColors', []) if sum(c)>0]
for key_name, virtual_id in key_map.items():
    kn = key_name.lower()
    x_pos = LAYOUT_X.get(kn, 0)
    if reverse: x_pos = 15.0 - x_pos
    base = virtual_id * 3
    if base + 2 >= 384: continue
    phase = (x_pos * width + t) % 1.0
    wave = (math.sin(phase * 6.28) + 1) / 2
    if rainbow:
        r, g, b = colorsys.hsv_to_rgb(phase, 1.0, brightness)
    elif grad_on and grad_colors:
        n = len(grad_colors)
        if n == 1:
            c = grad_colors[0]
            r, g, b = c[0]/255.0*brightness, c[1]/255.0*brightness, c[2]/255.0*brightness
        else:
            p = phase * n
            idx1 = int(p) % n
            idx2 = (idx1 + 1) % n
            frac = p - int(p)
            c1, c2 = grad_colors[idx1], grad_colors[idx2]
            r = (c1[0]*(1-frac) + c2[0]*frac) / 255.0 * brightness
            g = (c1[1]*(1-frac) + c2[1]*frac) / 255.0 * brightness
            b = (c1[2]*(1-frac) + c2[2]*frac) / 255.0 * brightness
    else:
        if rainbow_v2:
            base_hsv = colorsys.rgb_to_hsv(color[0]/255.0, color[1]/255.0, color[2]/255.0)
            shifted_hue = (base_hsv[0] + wave * 0.3) % 1.0
            r, g, b = colorsys.hsv_to_rgb(shifted_hue, base_hsv[1], base_hsv[2] * wave * brightness)
        else:
            r = color[0] / 255.0 * wave * brightness
            g = color[1] / 255.0 * wave * brightness
            b = color[2] / 255.0 * wave * brightness
    matrix[base] = int(r * 255)
    matrix[base+1] = int(g * 255)
    matrix[base+2] = int(b * 255)
